# neckarshore.ai

> KI-beschleunigte Softwareentwicklung aus Stuttgart. Nearshore AI & Software Development — Made in Germany.

## About

neckarshore.ai is a nearshore AI and software development partner based in Stuttgart, Germany. We help mid-sized companies and startups in the DACH region build software faster and more reliably — combining German engineering precision with modern AI acceleration. Same timezone, same language, same data protection standards.

## Founder

German Rauhut — former Mercedes-Benz IT, now founder of neckarshore.ai in Stuttgart.

## Flagship Product

OMNIXIS Documenter+X — an AI-first documentation engine that automatically generates compliance docs, technical documentation, and persona-aware chatbot responses from Git, Jira, and Confluence. BYOLLM (Bring Your Own LLM), fail-closed architecture, European hosting.

## Services

1. AI-Powered Development — NestJS, TypeScript, PostgreSQL production stack
2. Documentation Automation — OMNIXIS Documenter+X
3. AI Consulting & Strategy — LLM selection, automation assessment
4. DSGVO-by-Design — BYOLLM, tenant isolation, German hosting
5. Quality Engineering — 300+ automated tests, OWASP LLM Top 10, EU AI Act
6. Nearshore Partnership — team extension, remote-first, scalable

## Key Differentiators

- vs. Offshore: same timezone, same language, DSGVO-compliant by default
- vs. Big-4: 5-10x more cost-effective, direct engineer access
- vs. Freelancers: scalable team, structured processes, full project ownership
